sentences.arabic: كَانَ يُوجَدُ بِئْرٌ قَدِيمٌ فِي الْقَرْيَةِ يَشْرَبُ مِنْهُ الْجَمِيعُ.
sentences.translation: U selu je postojao stari bunar iz kojeg su svi pili.
sentences.translationEn: There was an old well in the village from which everyone drank.

sentences.arabic: ذَاتَ يَوْمٍ جَفَّ الْبِئْرُ وَقَلِقَ أَهْلُ الْقَرْيَةِ.
sentences.translation: Jednog dana se bunar isušio i mještani su se uznemirili.
sentences.translationEn: One day the well dried up and the villagers were worried.

sentences.arabic: تَشَاوَرَ الرِّجَالُ وَقَرَّرُوا حَفْرَ بِئْرٍ جَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Muškarci su se posavjetovali i odlučili su iskopati novi bunar.
sentences.translationEn: The men consulted and decided to dig a new well.

sentences.arabic: عَمِلَ الْجَمِيعُ مَعًا وَوَجَدُوا الْمَاءَ بَعْدَ يَوْمَيْنِ.
sentences.translation: Svi su radili zajedno i pronašli su vodu nakon dva dana.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone worked together and found water after two days.
